title: angelica controversa
intro: Angelica controversa, also known as mountain angelica or Saitama angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to improve digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Angelica controversa include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and protecting against cancer, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
